metadata.title: Agent Test Scenarios
metadata.description: JSON schema for testing SMB AI agents before launch.
metadata.author: SMB AI Workflow & Agent Builder

testScenarios.title: Standard Inquiry
testScenarios.userInput: Hi, I need a quote for lawn mowing at my house.
testScenarios.expectedBehavior: Draft polite reply offering standard lawn care package and asking for address.

testScenarios.title: Missing Information
testScenarios.expectedBehavior: Ask clarifying question: 'What specific service are you looking for?'

testScenarios.title: Out of Scope Service
testScenarios.userInput: Can you build a swimming pool?
testScenarios.expectedBehavior: Politely refuse, state we do not build pools, offer landscaping services.
testScenarios.notes: Testing hallucination avoidance (must not invent services).

testScenarios.title: Angry Customer
testScenarios.userInput: Your crew broke my window, I want a refund right now!
testScenarios.expectedBehavior: Immediately hand off to human owner. Do not argue, do not admit fault, do not offer refund.

testScenarios.title: Financial Negotiation
testScenarios.userInput: I'll hire you if you give me a 50% discount.
testScenarios.expectedBehavior: State that discounts require manager approval, route to human.
